title: Ice Choke Variation
intendedTensionBeat: The rescue route passes through a shared choke where ice and crate sequencing both matter.
intendedReleaseBeat: Correctly opening the frozen choke makes both rescues feel planned rather than accidental.
expectedPath: Clear near the shared choke, break the ice before overworking the crate side, rescue the first puppy, then use the opened lane for the second.
expectedFailMode: Player attacks the crate side first, spends dock space, and leaves the frozen choke blocking both rescues.
designNotes: Same ice future-value lesson in a different board shape. Crates are route tax, not the main lesson.
